theme: Local-customer auth routes and customer plan simulator reachability

findings.routeOrComponent: local-customer auth and customer plan simulator
findings.journey: a local customer test account signs in and switches public tiers
findings.expected: Local customer helpers are reachable through customer-host-only HTTP routes and return signed bearer sessions.
findings.actual: Before the fix, helper functions existed but no HTTP route exposed login, registration, or password reset.
findings.evidence: npm run test:local-customer-auth proves sessions advertising, admin-host denial, seeded login, signup, plan switch, password reset, and logout revocation.
findings.regressionTest: npm run test:local-customer-auth && npm run test:customer-plan-switching

findings.journey: separate PhantomForce and ChicagoShots users and organizations
findings.expected: Safe local Postgres fixture can run DB-auth browser proof.
findings.actual: Docker Desktop Linux engine was still unavailable.
findings.evidence: docker ps failed opening dockerDesktopLinuxEngine pipe

findings.journey: accepted game mechanic remains aligned with change-memory guard
findings.expected: npm run test:change-memory passes or the guard matches the accepted chicken-coop direction.
findings.actual: Only the Phantom Rumble ledge-recovery rule fails while the chicken-coop redesign is active.
findings.evidence: npm run test:change-memory failed with 2 missing ledge-recovery patterns
findings.regressionTest: npm run test:change-memory after Q-0014 is reconciled

commands.result: pass; no stale app cache ids
fail; known Q-0014 Phantom Rumble rule only

fixed: server startup did not initialize seeded local customer accounts
customer app login gate did not render for local-customer auth mode
local-customer logout did not revoke server sessions
blockedExternalAccess: Docker/Postgres fixture for DB-auth organization isolation
customer-domain HTTPS browser proof on a plain local HTTP server
knownFailures: npm run test:change-memory (Q-0014 Phantom Rumble ledge-recovery rule)

nextCycle: Reconcile Q-0014 Phantom Rumble chicken-coop mechanics with change-memory, then resume DB-auth organization isolation when Docker/Postgres is available.
